ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (English) */,
  "location_name_fr" TEXT /* Name of the location (French) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location (English) */,
  "address_fr" TEXT /* Address of the location (French) */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated (English) */,
  "region_fr" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated (French) */,
  "phu_id" INTEGER /* Public Health Unit identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_units" (
  "phu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Public Health Unit */,
  "phu" TEXT /* Name of the Public Health Unit (English) */,
  "phu_fr" TEXT /* Name of the Public Health Unit (French) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the Public Health Unit */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the Public Health Unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduling entry */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., symptomatic, asymptomatic) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the appointment slot */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the appointment slot */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the appointment slot is available */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, cancelled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service offered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient population */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "population_type" TEXT /* Type of patient population (e.g., symptomatic, asymptomatic) */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the patient population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accessibility" (
  "accessibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accessibility feature */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Accessibility feature (e.g., parking, ramps) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the accessibility feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accessibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken at the centre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_hours" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, cancelled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., nurse, doctor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centre_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service offered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centre_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centre_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centre_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment centre */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the centre */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id")
)
